summary: Plan-only PR inventory classification for 10 listed PRs. No shared canonical was selected. Security-sensitive PRs are routed to central security handling; non-security PRs are kept open or sent to maintainer review based on hydrated comments, review-bot findings, checks, and proof status.

actions.reason: Maintainer review is required before any merge or closeout decision; job mode and blocked_actions also prohibit merge or fix work.
Keep the PR open as related focused work; proof failures block merge or issue closeout but do not make the PR low-signal or closable.
Security-sensitive MCP/tool-boundary work is out of ProjectClownfish backlog cleanup scope and must be handled by central OpenClaw security review.
Security-boundary/session-state memory hardening work is routed to central OpenClaw security handling rather than backlog cleanup.
The closed PR remains security-sensitive historical context; no mutation is planned.
Active author follow-up plus unresolved technical correctness/review-bot validation requires human review before closing, merging, or superseding.
Keep as related open implementation work; failing proof/checks and unresolved review-bot findings block merge or fixed-by-candidate closeout.
Keep open as related follow-up work; proof failure and unrelated test churn block merge, but the PR is not a duplicate/low-signal close candidate in this shard.
This is ready for maintainer/product review rather than automated closeout or merge in plan mode.
Webhook/session identity behavior is security-sensitive in this cluster and must be routed to central OpenClaw security handling.

needs_human: #65359 needs maintainer review and review-bot/schema-artifact judgment before merge or closeout.
#70605 has active author follow-up plus unresolved technical correctness/review-bot validation around strikethrough sanitization.
